evals.prompt: 我最近做 AI 工具类短视频播放量不好，先帮我做 6 个抖音选题方向。不要直接写完整脚本，要说明每个选题为什么值得做、适合谁看、前 3 秒钩子是什么。
evals.expected_output: Uses topic_planning, gives multiple topic angles with audience, platform fit, hook, value, and asks user to choose before final script.
expectations: Output is not only titles
Output explains why each topic is worth making
Output asks for topic confirmation before writing the full script

evals.prompt: 我有一段 60 秒中文口播草稿，要做成小红书数字人口播视频。请先专业审查并改成平台化完整口播稿，再给数字人形象和场景建议。不要字幕，只需要问我要不要特效。首轮先出完整文字方案，不要调用 imagegen，也不要直接调用视频接口。
evals.expected_output: Uses script_rewrite plus avatar_talking_head, audits the supplied draft, includes a complete professionally optimized spoken script, title, hook, body, transitions, CTA, avatar, scene, explicit subtitles-disabled choice with Provider no-text policy, and effects choice before any image generation.
expectations: Output audits the supplied draft and includes the full optimized production-ready spoken script, not only a structure
Output includes avatar and scene plan
Output fixes subtitles disabled and asks only whether effects are enabled
Output does not call imagegen in the first response
Output does not call paid video API before confirmation

evals.prompt: 我已经有口播 mp4、音频和 srt 字幕，想保留原口播主体，SRT 只用来理解时间线，只自动补无文字 B-roll 和 9:16/16:9 两个版本。帮我给完整剪辑方案。
evals.expected_output: Uses hybrid_broll_edit, keeps original media, does not force TTS, uses SRT only as offline transcript reference, and plans non-text B-roll plus multi-ratio outputs without captions/cards.
expectations: Output prioritizes existing audio/video and uses subtitles only as offline transcript reference
Output does not force TTS
Output includes B-roll and multi-platform packaging plan

evals.prompt: 我要做一个 60 秒数字人口播视频，但当前视频模型一次最多只能生成 15 秒。我担心角色和场景不一致。请先审查怎么用同一个数字人参考图、首帧/尾帧目标图、多宫格分镜图来做方案；如果要分多段生成，也要保持一样的角色、场景和提示词规则，最后再拼成完整视频。不要直接调用付费接口。
evals.expected_output: Uses avatar_talking_head plus longform_editing, explains duration splitting by model limit, distinguishes single source/first-frame routes from multi-reference routes, reuses one visual bible and confirmed source assets, plans per-segment generation, dry-run inspection, polling, and stitching.
expectations: Output identifies the model duration limit and plans multiple segments
Output distinguishes video_source/first_frame, last_frame, storyboard_sheet, and segment_source roles
Output does not treat a storyboard sheet as the only source image for a single-image route
Output preserves one digital-human identity, scene, camera style, zero-written-text rule, aspect ratio, and resolution
Output includes dry-run and asset trace inspection before paid generation
Output includes stitching with scripts/stitch_clips.py after all clips are downloaded

evals.prompt: 我上传了一份企业客服 FAQ 和一份新员工培训 PPT，想做成 2 条无字幕数字人口播视频：一条给客户解释售后流程，一条给新员工做入职培训。请先分析素材和业务场景，给专业视频方案、数字人形象、B-roll、风险边界和验收指标。不要直接调用付费视频接口。
evals.expected_output: Uses business scenario routing before the normal content modes. Separates customer service FAQ from enterprise training, explains intent, target viewers, success metrics, compliance/risk boundaries, script structure, avatar/scene choices, non-text B-roll, explicit subtitles-disabled choice, Provider no-text policy, assets to confirm, and confirmation gates.
expectations: Output identifies two different business scenario routes instead of one generic talking-head plan
Output states user intent, target viewer, success metric, and risk boundary for each video
Output maps FAQ content to customer service structure and PPT content to training structure
Output includes avatar, scene, optional non-text B-roll, explicit subtitle choice, Provider no-text rule, generated/reference image plan, and the two confirmation gates
Output does not call paid video API before confirmation

evals.prompt: 我要做 45 秒数字人口播，但模型一次最多 15 秒。我担心 15 秒片段文案太短，数字人结尾空停；也担心只生成了部分片段就被当成完成。请给生成前和生成后的专业流程，不要直接调用付费接口。
evals.expected_output: Plans the minimum number of clips using model-supported request slots, preserves complete speech, allows short complete narration with verified idle-tail trimming, reuses the same visual_bible/assets, stitches only after all clips exist, and runs review_render.py before delivery.
expectations: Output requires per-segment script_pacing or spoken-duration calibration before paid generation
Output selects the smallest supported request slot or trims verified idle tail when a complete clip has less than 15 seconds of narration, without adding filler or requesting another approval
Output does not call partial output complete when clips are missing
Output includes review_render.py or an equivalent final-review step after stitching
Output includes tail-silence, duration, missing-clip, and freeze checks

evals.prompt: 我已经先确认了制作方案，又确认了实际生成的图片并要求开始制作。请说明你会如何在后台 dry-run、核对资产和模型字段，然后直接继续生成，不要让我重复确认同一套内容。
evals.expected_output: Runs preflight/dry-run after the second visible confirmation, verifies exact image digests, asset_trace, model, and request count, then creates the hash-bound confirmation file without another user approval when unchanged.
expectations: Output requires dry-run before paid generation but no repeated unchanged user confirmation
Output mentions asset_trace and selected model fields
Output requires a confirmation file, not only a manual confirmed flag
Output refuses paid generation when script_pacing or script_boundary is not safe

evals.prompt: 请读取提供的新员工培训页和客服 FAQ，分别做口播方案。政策、步骤和时效都不能编造，每条事实必须能回到页码或 FAQ 编号。
evals.expected_output: Creates two scenario-specific proposals and a machine-checkable source_fact_map. Facts without source evidence remain blocked or need confirmation.
expectations: Output contains source_fact_map entries with fact_id and source_locator
Training facts point to exact page numbers and FAQ facts point to exact FAQ ids
Output does not invent a fixed FAQ processing time
Missing facts are marked needs_user_confirmation or missing_source

evals.prompt: 我同时有已经剪好的口播 MP4、外部配音和 SRT。请分别说明保留原视频加 B-roll，以及用外部配音重新生成数字人的两条路线。
evals.expected_output: Separates existing-video enhancement from external-audio-driven avatar generation and explicitly names desired_output, speech_source, and timing_authority for both.
expectations: Existing-video route uses the MP4 as timing_authority and does not regenerate the speaker
New-avatar route uses external audio as timing_authority and chooses an audio-input model
User SRT is used only as offline transcript/reference material and never sent or rendered
Frame-accurate lip sync is not promised without verified provider evidence

evals.prompt: 我已经确认 45 秒三段数字人口播方案。请走完整 dry-run，但确认后我可能会换一张数字人图。说明系统应该怎么防止旧确认继续付费生成。
evals.expected_output: Uses workflow preflight and production-contract fingerprints. Any plan, model, asset, or dry-run change invalidates confirmation before key lookup/network access.
expectations: Output uses workflow_engine.py preflight and production-contract.json
Confirmation includes the contract digest
Changing the avatar image invalidates confirmation
Paid generation cannot use a manual confirmed flag

evals.prompt: 三段视频只下载了前两段，但已经有一个 30 秒预览。请告诉我现在是否可以交付，并给出继续执行和最终验收条件。
evals.expected_output: Labels the file partial-preview, resumes only missing work without duplicating completed submissions, and requires technical plus visual pass before delivery-manifest.json.
expectations: Output explicitly says the 30-second preview is not final delivery
Resume skips submitted/downloaded/verified jobs
Missing clips block finalize
Delivery requires final-review.json pass, visual-review.json pass, and delivery-manifest.json pass

evals.prompt: 三段视频都已付费提交，查询第一段结果时遇到一次 SSL/网络中断，另外两段已下载。请继续处理，但绝对不能再次付费生成。
evals.expected_output: Treats the polling network error as retryable, reuses the existing request id, leaves the paid submission counter unchanged, and never calls the generation submit endpoint again.
expectations: Network or polling timeout is distinguished from provider-declared generation failure
Existing request_id is polled again without a new generation submission
jobs.json paid_submission_attempts remains unchanged
Provider-declared terminal failure is not silently retried

evals.prompt: 45 秒三段中文数字人口播已经生成。脚本几乎没有标点，第二段说完后有 1.6 秒静音。不要添加字幕，请完成拼接和最终验收。
evals.expected_output: Keeps subtitles disabled, safely trims excessive model-generated tail silence while preserving the original clip, stitches clean segments, and requires technical plus visual/content pass with no_generated_text=true before delivery.
expectations: No SRT/VTT or captioned MP4 is generated
Tail trim keeps a short natural pause and records the edit in final.stitch-report.json
Postprocess manifest contains no subtitle generation or burn operation
Visual review confirms no_generated_text and spoken-content completeness
delivery-manifest.json is written only after every gate passes

evals.prompt: 我要生成 15 秒企业培训数字人口播。不要字幕，不要特效，不要 B-roll，只保留视频模型生成的完整视频。
evals.expected_output: Records duration=15, subtitle disabled, effects disabled, model_output_only, one segment, and one paid request; the verified generated clip is delivered without visual postproduction.
expectations: Output records explicit no-subtitle and no-effect choices
Output creates exactly one segment because 15 seconds fits the model limit
Output forbids B-roll, title cards, cutaways, masks, and generated text
Output preserves the verified model clip without visual postproduction

evals.prompt: 我要生成 15 秒客服 FAQ 数字人口播。即使我临时提出想要白色字幕，也请按当前 Skill 的无字幕交付规则执行，不要其他特效。
evals.expected_output: Keeps subtitles disabled because this user explicitly requested the no-subtitle rule, records effects disabled, forbids Provider-generated text and local subtitle burning for this project, and plans one clean MP4 delivery.
expectations: subtitle_plan.enabled is false and subtitle choice is disabled
Subtitle files are not sent to Provider and no caption burn is planned
No B-roll or title card is added
Visual review requires no_generated_text=true

evals.prompt: 我确认最终时长是 15 秒，模型最长也是 15 秒，脚本可以在 15 秒内完整讲完。请不要拆成多段。
evals.expected_output: Creates one shot with segmentation_reason=single_segment_within_model_limit and does not invent extra segments.
expectations: Duration source is user_confirmed
Segment count is exactly one
Paid request count is exactly one
The script is checked for pacing before submission

evals.prompt: 我确认要做 40 秒产品讲解，当前模型每段最长 15 秒。请按完整句子拆段并拼接，不要插入其他图片，字幕和特效都关闭。
evals.expected_output: Splits the confirmed 40 seconds only because it exceeds the model limit, preserves one visual bible/source image, stitches generated clips, and inserts no other media.
expectations: Segmentation reason is confirmed_duration_exceeds_model_limit
The minimum paid segment count is three and the legal request slots are 15 plus 15 plus 10 seconds
Every non-final segment ends at a complete sentence
No B-roll, title card, mask, or subtitle is added
Only generated clips are stitched in order

evals.prompt: 请读取提供的产品素材说明和数字人参考信息，目标是抖音 30 秒知识分享口播。原稿是：‘我们产品绝对能提升百分之八十效率，任何公司都能零培训上手，而且永远不会出错。今天给大家介绍一下我们的产品，它真的非常好，非常强大，大家赶快用。’请按 skill 制作；如原稿不专业或不适合 30 秒，请基于素材专业优化。第一条回复先给我完整文字视频方案和优化后的完整口播稿；我确认方案后，再生成视频真实会使用的数字人源图/首帧和必要分镜图供我确认。不要调用视频接口。
evals.expected_output: The first response reads and inventories the supplied material/reference information, diagnoses unsupported claims and weak platform/pacing structure, and provides a complete optimized script and full text proposal without imagegen. After plan confirmation, the next response uses Codex built-in gpt-image-2 for real production images and waits for image confirmation. No paid video call occurs before the second confirmation.
expectations: First assistant turn is a complete textual production proposal and is not image-only
The first response includes the complete text plan on the primary assistant response surface and does not call imagegen
Output inventories each supplied asset and explains its planned use
Output diagnoses unsupported absolute claims, weak hook, repetition, CTA, platform fit, and duration/pacing
Output contains the full professionally optimized verbatim script, not only a script outline
Unsupported metrics and guarantees are removed or marked as needing evidence

Output includes duration/pacing, avatar/scene/camera, subtitle choice plus Provider no-text rule, effects choice, planned image prompts and payload/preview roles, model route, segment count, and paid request count
After plan confirmation, the next assistant response uses built-in gpt-image-2 for real video payload images and waits for image confirmation
No paid video API is called before confirmation

evals.prompt: 一个两段拼接的数字人口播在第二段开头把‘目前’听成了‘前’，请比较原始 shot_02、规范化片段、拼接报告和最终视频，判断是模型漏读、裁剪、淡入还是编码边界问题，并修复后续工作流。不要重新付费生成没有问题的片段。
evals.expected_output: Uses isolated-source versus final-boundary evidence, distinguishes trim/drop from onset attenuation, blocks overloaded segments above 95% spoken fill, preserves 0.3-0.5s speech-safety head/tail pauses, stitches PCM intermediates without per-clip fades/crossfades and with one final AAC encode, and reviews incoming first-word onset before delivery.
expectations: Output checks clip_edits and packet/timeline evidence before claiming the character was trimmed
Output compares the incoming source clip head with the final boundary instead of checking only the outgoing tail
Segments above 95 percent spoken fill are blocked as too_long
Segment prompts reserve a clean head/tail pause and require the complete first and final words
Stitching applies no per-clip head fade or crossfade and uses PCM intermediates with one final AAC encode
A compound Chinese ASR token alone is not accepted as proof that every character onset is intact
If only the final edit is defective, intact source clips are restitched without paid regeneration
If the isolated source clip is materially defective, qualified delivery is blocked and no second paid POST is made

evals.prompt: 请用我提供的口播稿和人物素材制作数字人视频。第一条回复必须让我看到专业视频方案和优化后的完整口播稿，不能只回复一张图片；我确认方案后再生成首帧或必要分镜供我确认，确认图片后自动制作。
evals.expected_output: Uses a two-confirmation flow: complete text proposal first with no imagegen, built-in gpt-image-2 production images only after plan confirmation, and paid automatic production only after the exact images are confirmed.
expectations: First response contains complete proposal text and does not call imagegen or a paid video API
proposal.md contains material review, full optimized spoken script, duration/segments, visual route, and paid cap
At least one actual generated video_source, first_frame, or segment_source image is marked video_payload
Any multi-grid storyboard is marked preview_only and is not the sole single-image video input
After plan confirmation, built-in image_gen/image2 creates the video payload image; functions.exec text is not accepted as proposal delivery
No confirmation-board artifacts are generated
The second confirmation approves exact image digests and starts automatic production without a third routine confirmation

evals.prompt: 两段数字人口播已生成并通过技术和画面检查。第二段开头原稿是‘更值得关注的是 Ultra’，多次 ASR 对前面的连接短语给出不同乱码，但 Ultra、多个智能体并行协作等核心事实和后续口播都清楚，人工听感可理解，用户没有要求逐字一致。再次生成会增加 API 成本和等待时间。请决定应交付还是重生，并说明记录方式。
evals.expected_output: Uses critical_facts_exact while allowing harmless meaning-preserving connective wording, separates ASR uncertainty from actual lip sync, compares isolated source and final boundary, classifies the result as pass_with_notes, records structured minor discrepancies, and delivers without paid regeneration.
expectations: Defaults factual creator content to critical_facts_exact while treating the connective phrase as non-critical wording
A single or unstable ASR mismatch is not automatic permission for paid regeneration
The isolated source segment is compared with the final stitched boundary before deciding the repair type
Critical terms, core facts, meaning, and intelligibility are checked separately from exact connective wording
Pronunciation or transcript uncertainty does not by itself set lip_sync_acceptable to false
The result is pass_with_notes with structured minor_discrepancies and empty material_discrepancies
delivery-manifest status remains pass and delivery_classification is pass_with_notes
The normal contract has repair_reserve zero and per_shot_repair_limit zero, and no paid regeneration is used

evals.prompt: 请把提供的口播稿做成抖音 30 秒数字人口播。当前视频模型单次可选时长只有 4、6、8、10、12、15 秒，最多 15 秒。原稿有三个自然段，但请优先控制等待和调用成本，给出首轮文字方案，不要调用视频接口。
evals.expected_output: Reviews and lightly optimizes the real Vibe Coding script, treats 30 seconds as the delivery maximum, uses the deterministic minimum-segment planner, and proposes exactly two 15-second provider requests rather than three paragraph-based requests.
expectations: The full optimized script is estimated to fit the 30-second delivery window
The plan records delivery_max_seconds as 30 and keeps it unchanged
The minimum required segment count and base paid request count are both two
The two request_duration_seconds values are 15 and 15 and both belong to allowed_durations_seconds
The optimized script stays in the normal 85%-95% spoken-fill window, and a multi-segment plan below 75% is blocked before image or video spend
The plan separately records estimated natural pauses, estimated delivery, removable idle trim, and zero planned delivery overshoot
The three source paragraphs are reorganized into two complete spoken segments rather than three paid requests
Every non-final segment ends at a complete strong sentence; a comma or unfinished from-to clause is never mechanically changed into a period
The first proposal and later generation plan expose the same duration_plan_digest, and changing exact text or a request slot changes the digest
The real final MP4 is hard-blocked above 30 seconds except for the fixed one-frame container measurement allowance

evals.prompt: 三段数字人口播已各提交一次。第一段的一次 Whisper 结果把‘企业管理者’识别成‘实验管理者’，但人工听感大意清楚；第三段画面有瑕疵。如果 Provider 后续又返回终止失败，也不要自动花钱返修。请给出处理和验收规则。
evals.expected_output: Keeps quality review, but authorizes zero paid repair: unstable or meaning-preserving speech is pass_with_notes, edit defects use local post-processing, material provider-output defects or terminal failure block qualified delivery, and no shot receives a second POST.
expectations: max_paid_submissions equals the three base requests, repair_reserve is zero, and per_shot_repair_limit is zero
Each shot may be POSTed at most once regardless of ASR, quality review, or terminal provider status
Polling or downloading the same request_id may resume without changing paid_submission_attempts
Meaning-preserving or ASR-only uncertainty is delivered as pass_with_notes without paid regeneration
Local trim, restitch, and encode fixes are allowed and recorded in postprocess-manifest.json; only a Stage-B1-confirmed local subtitle burn is allowed
A material provider-output defect or terminal failure blocks qualified delivery and does not trigger a new POST
The confirmed paid contract, model snapshot, dry-run evidence, confirmation, and jobs contract digest remain immutable after submission
Final delivery requires exactly one attempt plus matching paid request, poll, request ID, contract, payload, clip path, and clip SHA-256 evidence for every verified base shot
A submit followed by terminal provider failure and resume still produces exactly one POST call

evals.prompt: 两段数字人口播已经生成并拼接。第二段的视频模型自己在画面里写了一句中文，后期又准备烧录 SRT，导致文字重叠。以后取消字幕：生成提示词不允许任何画面文字，视频请求不传字幕，剪辑拼接也不添加字幕。请修正方案并说明验收。
evals.expected_output: Records subtitles disabled for this project, applies the fixed Provider no-text policy across prompt and payload, removes contradictory post-generation subtitle wording, performs no local subtitle burn, and blocks qualified delivery when Provider pixels contain text without automatically paying for regeneration.
expectations: Segment prompt contains one unambiguous clean-frame contract and no sentence promising subtitles after generation
Prompt forbids subtitles, captions, lower thirds, title cards, labels, letters, numbers, logos, and watermarks in every language
subtitle_plan.enabled is false, requires_user_confirmation is false, and SRT/captioned output paths are empty
Every dry-run and paid request records subtitle_included_in_payload=false
finalize_project and finalize_postproduction do not generate or burn subtitles for this disabled plan
Visual review requires no_generated_text=true; embedded Provider text blocks qualified delivery
No extra confirmation and no automatic paid regeneration are introduced

evals.prompt: 这份 30 秒数字人方案我确认，需要字幕。请不要让视频模型生成字幕，要适配抖音竖屏安全区。
evals.expected_output: Treats the message as Confirmation 1 plus subtitle opt-in, records user_plan_confirmation and postproduction_burn_only without a third confirmation, keeps Provider prompt/payload text-free, preflights local tools, reviews the clean MP4 first, then locally creates/burns captions with the vertical platform profile and reviews the captioned MP4.
expectations: The confirmation records subtitle_plan.enabled=true, request_source=user_plan_confirmation, and confirmation_status=confirmed
Every Provider prompt and payload remains text-free and subtitle_included_in_payload=false
Local subtitle runtime is checked before paid video generation
Clean Provider output passes no_generated_text=true before subtitle generation or burn
The caption burn uses the Douyin vertical profile, transparent background, at most two lines, and no paid API call
No third confirmation and no additional paid video request are introduced

evals.prompt: 需要字幕。
evals.expected_output: Updates the proposed subtitle choice but does not treat this standalone request as Confirmation 1; it keeps request_source default or confirmation pending and does not start image or paid video generation.
expectations: A standalone subtitle request does not approve the complete Stage B1 plan
The plan remains awaiting plan confirmation
No image generation or paid video API starts

evals.prompt: 方案已经确认并要求字幕。最终音频的本地小模型把‘企业管理者’识别成了‘实验管理者’，但确认稿写的是‘企业管理者’。请生成 YouTube 横屏字幕，并避免字幕过大遮脸。
evals.expected_output: Uses the confirmed script as caption words and final local audio only as cue timing, preserves raw ASR evidence, converts platform pixel targets into libass script coordinates, burns a transparent outlined YouTube-horizontal caption copy locally, and blocks delivery until representative frames prove readable safe placement.
expectations: The final SRT contains 企业管理者 from the confirmed script and records lexical_source=confirmed_script
The raw mistaken ASR SRT is preserved with its own path and SHA-256 instead of replacing confirmed copy
Final subtitle cue timing comes from the final clean MP4 audio and ends no later than the verified video duration
The YouTube 16:9 profile is selected and target pixels are converted to libass script coordinates
Representative captioned frames show at most two lines, no caption bar, no face or mouth obstruction, and platform-safe margins
All subtitle generation and rerender operations record paid_api_call=false

evals.prompt: 我想把当前数字人口播 Skill 的 model 字符串直接改成 Kling、Veo 或另一个 Seedance 接口，然后继续按原流程付费生成。请告诉我目前真正适配了哪些模型，以及切换模型前必须做什么。
evals.expected_output: Discloses the exact bundled adapter matrix and refuses model-name-only switching. It distinguishes runtime-verified, schema-verified, and disabled routes, then requires provider-specific capability, payload, polling, validation, testing, and real-output adaptation before paid use.
expectations: The default grok_talking_head_basic route is identified as the 119337 grok-video-1.5 alias mapped to grok-imagine-video-1.5 with supported_runtime_verified status
The fal Seedance route is identified as supported_schema_verified, with image and audio adapter support but no current video-reference mapping or frame-accurate mouth-sync guarantee
The multi_reference_creator_video route remains disabled and cannot be used for paid generation
Changing only model, base_url, or an environment override is rejected as insufficient
The answer requires endpoint, authentication, payload, polling/result, duration, reference, audio, subtitle, validation, and test adaptation
A new route stays disabled with custom_unverified status until dry-run, regression tests, controlled real generation, and final MP4 QA are complete
